expectations.text: Output does not contain hardcoded breakpoint 600px
expectations.evidence: Line 7: @media (min-width: 600px) — invented breakpoint not from the project token system

expectations.text: Output does not contain hardcoded breakpoint 1024px
expectations.evidence: Line 11: @media (min-width: 1024px) — invented breakpoint not from the project token system

expectations.text: Output does not contain hardcoded breakpoint 768px
expectations.evidence: No 768px — agent used 600px/1024px instead (different wrong values)

expectations.text: Output uses project SCSS breakpoint variables ($break-tablet, $break-desktop) or @use to import them
expectations.evidence: No @use or $break- variables — hardcoded 600px and 1024px instead

expectations.text: Output uses logical padding properties (padding-block, padding-inline) instead of shorthand padding:
expectations.evidence: Line 5: padding: 1rem — physical shorthand, not logical properties

expectations.text: Responsive @media blocks appear after the base .menu-grid selector, not before
expectations.evidence: Base selector lines 1-14, @media blocks lines 7-13 are nested inside — correct order
